EXPLANATION: The cited paper, "Tomg-bench: Evaluating llms on text-based open molecule generation," is a real paper that was available at the cited arXiv URL under that exact title. While later versions or submissions may have changed the title and updated the author list, the reference as provided corresponds to an actual, identifiable arXiv preprint.
